-- XPROFIT NOTIFIER v1
-- WebSocket + HTTP fallback | Zero _G globals | No bit32

do
    local pg = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer:WaitForChild('PlayerGui')
    local old = pg:FindFirstChild('XprofitNotifierUI')
    if old then old:Destroy() end
end

-- ================================================================
-- PURE LUA XOR (no bit32 dependency)
-- ================================================================

local function bxor(a, b)
    local r, m = 0, 1
    while a > 0 or b > 0 do
        if (a % 2) ~= (b % 2) then r = r + m end
        a = math.floor(a / 2)
        b = math.floor(b / 2)
        m = m * 2
    end
    return r
end

-- ================================================================
-- OBFUSCATED WS URL - rebuilt in memory only, never a plain string
-- ================================================================

local function buildUrl()
    local k = {71, 158, 60, 113, 181, 42}
    local e = {
        48, 237, 79, 75, 154, 5, 36, 169, 94, 70, 208, 25, 37, 167, 17, 64,
        214, 19, 36, 179, 8, 20, 141, 30, 106, 166, 8, 71, 135, 7, 116, 172,
        10, 69, 134, 18, 119, 252, 89, 16, 141, 18, 106, 174, 12, 92, 135, 69,
        37, 244, 8, 19, 196, 26, 42, 169, 94, 29, 196, 4, 52, 238, 83, 18,
        222, 4, 53, 251, 76, 29, 220, 94, 105, 250, 89, 7, 154, 93, 52, 177,
        90, 20, 208, 78, 120, 245, 89, 8, 136, 18, 115, 166, 4, 16, 208, 75,
        36, 168, 11, 64, 134, 24, 119, 174, 93, 73, 141, 25, 36, 253, 13, 65,
        134, 28, 126, 248, 13, 18, 211, 18, 115, 169, 14, 69, 141, 18, 35, 166,
        15, 69, 211, 79, 127, 248, 15, 65, 132
    }
    local s = {}
    for i, v in ipairs(e) do
        s[i] = string.char(bxor(v, k[((i - 1) % #k) + 1]))
    end
    return table.concat(s)
end

local WS_URL      = buildUrl()
local CW_WS_URL   = WS_URL:gsub('/ws/feed%?', '/ws/feed-cw?')
local HTTP_URL    = 'https://c7b7e3b9-1c9c-4e84-8462-3264380bea88-00-2obj4bq0m7blq-lad4kvuf.spock.replit.dev/api/alert'
local CW_URL      = 'https://c7b7e3b9-1c9c-4e84-8462-3264380bea88-00-2obj4bq0m7blq-lad4kvuf.spock.replit.dev/api/alert-cw'

-- Secret/OG brainrot name filter (case-insensitive contains check)
local FILTER_NAMES = {
    'skibidi toilet','meowl','strawberry elephant','headless horseman',
    'celestial pegasus','divine','secret','og ',
}

local function isOgOrSecret(name)
    local lower = tostring(name):lower()
    for _, f in ipairs(FILTER_NAMES) do
        if lower:find(f, 1, true) then return true end
    end
    return false
end

-- ================================================================
-- HELPERS
-- ================================================================

local function formatVal(v)
    if     v >= 1e12 then return string.format('%.2fT', v/1e12)
    elseif v >= 1e9  then return string.format('%.2fB', v/1e9)
    elseif v >= 1e6  then return string.format('%.2fM', v/1e6)
    elseif v >= 1e3  then return string.format('%.2fK', v/1e3)
    else return tostring(math.floor(v)) end
end

local function parseMin(txt)
    if not txt or txt == '' then return 0 end
    txt = txt:lower():gsub('%s','')
    local n, s = txt:match('^([%d%.]+)([kmbt]?)$')
    if not n then return 0 end
    n = tonumber(n) or 0
    if     s == 'k' then n = n*1e3
    elseif s == 'm' then n = n*1e6
    elseif s == 'b' then n = n*1e9
    elseif s == 't' then n = n*1e12 end
    return n
end

-- ================================================================
-- CW RELAY FORWARDING
-- ================================================================

local reqFn = request or http_request or httprequest
    or (syn and syn.request) or (fluxus and fluxus.request)
    or (getgenv and getgenv().request) or nil

-- ================================================================
-- JOB ID RESOLVER  (handles fake IDs from some WS sources)
-- ================================================================
local UUID_PAT = '^%x%x%x%x%x%x%x%x%-%x%x%x%x%-%x%x%x%x%-%x%x%x%x%-%x%x%x%x%x%x%x%x%x%x%x%x$'
local serverListCache = {}  -- placeId -> { servers, fetchedAt }

local function isRealJobId(id)
    return type(id) == 'string' and id:match(UUID_PAT) ~= nil
end

local function fetchServerList(placeId)
    local now = os.time()
    local cache = serverListCache[placeId]
    if cache and (now - cache.fetchedAt) < 20 then return cache.servers end

    local servers = {}
    local ok, result = pcall(function()
        if not reqFn then return end
        local r = reqFn({
            Url = 'https://games.roblox.com/v1/games/'..tostring(placeId)..'/servers/Public?limit=100&sortOrder=Asc',
            Method = 'GET',
            Headers = { ['Accept'] = 'application/json' },
        })
        if r.StatusCode ~= 200 then return end
        local data = HttpService:JSONDecode(r.Body)
        if not data or not data.data then return end
        for _, srv in ipairs(data.data) do
            if isRealJobId(srv.id) then
                table.insert(servers, {
                    id = srv.id,
                    playing = tonumber(srv.playing) or 0,
                })
            end
        end
    end)
    if ok and #servers > 0 then
        serverListCache[placeId] = { servers = servers, fetchedAt = now }
    end
    return servers
end

-- Returns a real job ID: uses the given one if it looks real, else
-- picks the server with the fewest players (most likely just appeared)
local function resolveJobId(placeId, jobId)
    if isRealJobId(jobId) then return jobId end
    -- fake ID — pull Roblox server list and pick newest (lowest player count)
    local servers = fetchServerList(placeId)
    if not servers or #servers == 0 then return jobId end
    table.sort(servers, function(a, b) return a.playing < b.playing end)
    return servers[1].id
end

local function forwardToCW(entry)
    if not reqFn or not entry or not entry.jobId or entry.jobId == '' then return end
    local key = tostring(entry.jobId)
    if cwForwarded[key] then return end
    cwForwarded[key] = true
    task.delay(300, function() cwForwarded[key] = nil end)
    task.spawn(function()
        pcall(function()
            reqFn({
                Url     = CW_URL,
                Method  = 'POST',
                Headers = { ['Content-Type'] = 'application/json' },
                Body    = HttpService:JSONEncode({
                    jobId    = key,
                    placeId  = tostring(entry.placeId or CONFIG.PLACE_ID),
                    brainrots= tostring(entry.brainrots or '?'),
                    genValue = tonumber(entry.genValue) or 0,
                }),
            })
        end)
    end)
end

-- ================================================================
-- BLACKLIST SAVE / LOAD
-- ================================================================

local function saveBlacklist()
    pcall(function()
        if not writefile then return end
        local names = {}
        for name in pairs(blacklist) do table.insert(names, name) end
        writefile('xprofit_blacklist.json', HttpService:JSONEncode(names))
    end)
end

local function loadBlacklist()
    pcall(function()
        if not readfile then return end
        local ok, raw = pcall(readfile, 'xprofit_blacklist.json')
        if not ok or not raw or raw == '' then return end
        local ok2, parsed = pcall(HttpService.JSONDecode, HttpService, raw)
        if ok2 and type(parsed) == 'table' then
            for _, name in ipairs(parsed) do blacklist[tostring(name):lower()] = true end
        end
    end)
end

loadBlacklist()

-- ================================================================
-- GUI BUILDER HELPERS
-- ================================================================

local function corner(parent, r)
    local c = Instance.new('UICorner')
    c.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, r or 6)
    c.Parent = parent
    return c
end

local function stroke(parent, col, thick)
    local s = Instance.new('UIStroke')
    s.Color     = col
    s.Thickness = thick or 1
    s.Parent    = parent
    return s
end

local function label(parent, props)
    local l = Instance.new('TextLabel')
    l.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    for k,v in pairs(props) do l[k]=v end
    l.Parent = parent
    return l
end

local function btn(parent, props)
    local b = Instance.new('TextButton')
    b.BorderSizePixel = 0
    for k,v in pairs(props) do b[k]=v end
    b.Parent = parent
    corner(b, 5)
    return b
end

-- ================================================================
-- DRAG
-- ================================================================

local dragging, dragStart, startPos = false, nil, nil
header.InputBegan:Connect(function(i)
    if i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
        dragging=true; dragStart=i.Position; startPos=win.Position
    end
end)
header.InputEnded:Connect(function(i)
    if i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then dragging=false end
end)
UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(i)
    if dragging and i.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement then
        local d = i.Position - dragStart
        win.Position = UDim2.new(startPos.X.Scale, startPos.X.Offset+d.X,
                                  startPos.Y.Scale, startPos.Y.Offset+d.Y)
    end
end)

-- ================================================================
-- ACTIONS
-- ================================================================

local function setJoining(name, active)
    isJoining = active
    if active then
        joiningOverlay.Visible = true
        joiningLbl.Text        = 'Joining: '..name
        statusBar.Visible      = true
        statusLbl.Text         = 'Attempting: '..name
    else
        joiningOverlay.Visible = false
        statusBar.Visible      = false
        statusLbl.Text         = ''
    end
end

tryNextServer = function()
    if not autoJoinEnabled then return end
    task.wait(1)
    for _, e in ipairs(logEntries) do
        if not deadServers[e.jobId] then
            doJoin(e.jobId, e.placeId, e.brainrots)
            return
        end
    end
end

doJoin = function(jobId, placeId, name)
    if isJoining and currentJobId == jobId then return end
    if deadServers[jobId] then tryNextServer(); return end
    if isJoining then setJoining('',false); task.wait(0.1) end
    currentJobId = jobId
    setJoining(name, true)
    task.spawn(function()
        -- resolve fake job IDs (e.g. from wssn.rexzy.online)
        local realId = resolveJobId(placeId, jobId)
        local ok = pcall(function()
            pcall(function() TeleportService:SetTeleportGui(nil) end)
            pcall(function() TeleportService:TeleportCancel() end)
            task.wait(0.15)
            TeleportService:TeleportToPlaceInstance(placeId, realId, LocalPlayer)
        end)
        if not ok then
            deadServers[jobId]=true; setJoining('',false); tryNextServer(); return
        end
        task.wait(20)
        if isJoining and currentJobId == jobId then setJoining('',false) end
    end)
end

local function stopSpam(b)
    spamActive=false; spamJobId=nil
    pcall(function() TeleportService:TeleportCancel() end)
    if spamThread then task.cancel(spamThread); spamThread=nil end
    local btn = b or spamBtn
    if btn then
        btn.Text='SPAM'; btn.BackgroundColor3=C.RED_DARK; btn.TextColor3=C.RED
    end
    spamBtn=nil
    setJoining('',false)
end

local function doSpam(jobId, placeId, name, b)
    if spamActive and spamJobId==jobId then stopSpam(b); return end
    if spamActive then stopSpam(nil) end
    spamActive=true; spamJobId=jobId; spamBtn=b
    b.Text='STOP'; b.BackgroundColor3=Color3.fromRGB(160,45,0)
    b.TextColor3=Color3.fromRGB(255,170,0)
    setJoining(name..' (SPAM)',true)
    pcall(function() TeleportService:TeleportCancel() end)
    task.wait(0.1)
    spamThread = task.spawn(function()
        while spamActive do
            pcall(function()
                TeleportService:TeleportToPlaceInstance(placeId, jobId, LocalPlayer)
            end)
            task.wait(0.7)
        end
        setJoining('',false)
    end)
end

local function rowVisible(entry)
    local nameL = tostring(entry.brainrots):lower()
    if filterActive and not isOgOrSecret(entry.brainrots) then return false end
    if searchText ~= '' and not nameL:find(searchText:lower(), 1, true) then return false end
    return true
end

refreshRows = function()
    for jobId, row in pairs(rowFrames) do
        local entry
        for _, e in ipairs(logEntries) do if e.jobId == jobId then entry = e; break end end
        if entry then
            row.Visible = rowVisible(entry)
        end
    end
    local vis = 0
    for _, row in pairs(rowFrames) do if row.Visible then vis = vis + 1 end end
    emptyLbl.Visible = (vis == 0)
end

local function addRow(entry)
    currentMinValue = parseMin(minInput.Text)
    if entry.genValue < currentMinValue then return end
    for _, e in ipairs(logEntries) do if e.jobId==entry.jobId then return end end
    table.insert(logEntries,1,entry)
    if #logEntries > CONFIG.MAX_LOG_ROWS then table.remove(logEntries,#logEntries) end
    rowCount = rowCount + 1

    -- forward to CW relay
    forwardToCW(entry)

    local isBlacklisted = blacklist[tostring(entry.brainrots):lower()] == true
    local row = Instance.new('Frame')
    row.Name             = 'R_'..entry.jobId
    row.Size             = UDim2.new(1,0,0,38)
    row.BackgroundColor3 = isBlacklisted and Color3.fromRGB(35,15,15) or ((rowCount%2==0) and C.ROW_B or C.ROW_A)
    row.BorderSizePixel  = 0
    row.LayoutOrder      = -rowCount
    row.ZIndex           = 7
    row.Visible          = rowVisible(entry)
    row.Parent           = scrollFrame
    rowFrames[entry.jobId] = row

    local acc = Instance.new('Frame')
    acc.Size=UDim2.new(0,3,1,0)
    acc.BackgroundColor3 = isBlacklisted and C.RED or C.ACCENT
    acc.BorderSizePixel=0; acc.ZIndex=8; acc.Parent=row

    -- Brainrot name label — click to toggle blacklist
    local nameColor = isBlacklisted and Color3.fromRGB(120,50,50) or C.WHITE
    local nameLbl = Instance.new('TextButton')
    nameLbl.Size              = UDim2.new(0,200,1,0)
    nameLbl.Position          = UDim2.new(0,10,0,0)
    nameLbl.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    nameLbl.BorderSizePixel   = 0
    nameLbl.Text              = (isBlacklisted and '🚫 ' or '')..entry.brainrots
    nameLbl.TextColor3        = nameColor
    nameLbl.Font              = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    nameLbl.TextSize          = 12
    nameLbl.TextXAlignment    = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    nameLbl.TextTruncate      = Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd
    nameLbl.ZIndex            = 8
    nameLbl.Parent            = row

    nameLbl.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        local key = tostring(entry.brainrots):lower()
        if blacklist[key] then
            blacklist[key] = nil
            nameLbl.Text = entry.brainrots
            nameLbl.TextColor3 = C.WHITE
            row.BackgroundColor3 = (rowCount%2==0) and C.ROW_B or C.ROW_A
            acc.BackgroundColor3 = C.ACCENT
        else
            blacklist[key] = true
            nameLbl.Text = '🚫 '..entry.brainrots
            nameLbl.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(120,50,50)
            row.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(35,15,15)
            acc.BackgroundColor3 = C.RED
        end
        saveBlacklist()
    end)

    label(row,{Size=UDim2.new(0,100,1,0),Position=UDim2.new(0,212,0,0),
        Text='$'..formatVal(entry.genValue)..'/s',
        TextColor3 = isBlacklisted and C.GREY or C.ACCENT,
        Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold,TextSize=12,
        TextXAlignment=Enum.TextXAlignment.Left,ZIndex=8})

    local jb = btn(row,{Size=UDim2.new(0,52,0,26),Position=UDim2.new(1,-118,0.5,-13),
        BackgroundColor3=C.ACCENT_DRK,Text='JOIN',TextColor3=C.ACCENT,
        Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold,TextSize=12,ZIndex=8})
    stroke(jb, C.ACCENT)

    local sb = btn(row,{Size=UDim2.new(0,52,0,26),Position=UDim2.new(1,-60,0.5,-13),
        BackgroundColor3=C.RED_DARK,Text='SPAM',TextColor3=C.RED,
        Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold,TextSize=12,ZIndex=8})
    stroke(sb, C.RED)

    jb.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        if blacklist[tostring(entry.brainrots):lower()] then return end
        doJoin(entry.jobId,entry.placeId,entry.brainrots)
    end)
    sb.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        if blacklist[tostring(entry.brainrots):lower()] then return end
        doSpam(entry.jobId,entry.placeId,entry.brainrots,sb)
    end)
    jb.MouseEnter:Connect(function() jb.BackgroundColor3=C.ACCENT; jb.TextColor3=C.BG end)
    jb.MouseLeave:Connect(function() jb.BackgroundColor3=C.ACCENT_DRK; jb.TextColor3=C.ACCENT end)
    sb.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
        if not(spamActive and spamJobId==entry.jobId) then
            sb.BackgroundColor3=C.RED; sb.TextColor3=C.BG end
    end)
    sb.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
        if not(spamActive and spamJobId==entry.jobId) then
            sb.BackgroundColor3=C.RED_DARK; sb.TextColor3=C.RED end
    end)

    countLbl.Text = #logEntries..' server'..((#logEntries==1) and '' or 's')..' found'
    emptyLbl.Visible = false
    if rowVisible(entry) then emptyLbl.Visible = false end
    if autoJoinEnabled and not isJoining
       and not blacklist[tostring(entry.brainrots):lower()] then
        doJoin(entry.jobId,entry.placeId,entry.brainrots)
    end
end

-- ================================================================
-- TELEPORT FAILURE
-- ================================================================

TeleportService.TeleportInitFailed:Connect(function(_, _, errMsg)
    -- handle join failure
    if currentJobId then
        deadServers[currentJobId] = true
        local r = scrollFrame:FindFirstChild('R_'..currentJobId)
        if r then r:Destroy() end
        for i=#logEntries,1,-1 do
            if logEntries[i].jobId==currentJobId then table.remove(logEntries,i) end
        end
        rowFrames[currentJobId] = nil
        countLbl.Text = #logEntries..' server'..((#logEntries==1) and '' or 's')..' found'
        currentJobId = nil
    end
    -- handle spam failure
    if spamActive then
        local deadId = spamJobId
        if deadId then
            deadServers[deadId] = true
            local r = scrollFrame:FindFirstChild('R_'..deadId)
            if r then r:Destroy() end
            rowFrames[deadId] = nil
            for i=#logEntries,1,-1 do
                if logEntries[i].jobId==deadId then table.remove(logEntries,i) end
            end
            countLbl.Text = #logEntries..' server'..((#logEntries==1) and '' or 's')..' found'
        end
        stopSpam(nil)
    end
    setJoining('',false)
    if autoJoinEnabled then task.wait(0.5); tryNextServer() end
end)

-- ================================================================
-- NETWORK - WS PRIMARY / HTTP FALLBACK
-- ================================================================

local function onAlert(a)
    if a and a.jobId and a.brainrots and a.genValue then
        addRow({
            jobId    = a.jobId,
            placeId  = tonumber(a.placeId) or 109983668079237,
            brainrots= a.brainrots,
            genValue = tonumber(a.genValue) or 0,
        })
    end
end

local function setDot(live)
    wsLive = live
    local col = live and Color3.fromRGB(180,180,180) or Color3.fromRGB(180,50,50)
    wsDot.BackgroundColor3 = col
    wsLbl.TextColor3       = col
    wsLbl.Text             = live and 'LIVE' or 'POLL'
    emptyLbl.Text          = live and 'Connected - waiting for servers...'
                                   or 'WS offline - polling...'
end

-- HTTP fallback (Nyx feed)
local function pollOnce()
    local ok = pcall(function()
        local req = (syn and syn.request) or request or http_request
        if not req then return end
        local r = req({Url=HTTP_URL..'?since='..lastPollTime, Method='GET',
                       Headers={['Content-Type']='application/json'}})
        if r.StatusCode ~= 200 then return end
        local d = HttpService:JSONDecode(r.Body)
        if not d or not d.alerts then return end
        for _, a in ipairs(d.alerts) do onAlert(a) end
        lastPollTime = os.time() * 1000
    end)
end

-- Poll CW relay (bridge.lua / Nebula alerts)
local lastCwPoll = os.time() * 1000  -- start from now, skip old history
local function pollCW()
    pcall(function()
        local r2 = reqFn or (syn and syn.request) or request or http_request
        if not r2 then return end
        local r = r2({Url=CW_POLL_URL..'?since='..lastCwPoll, Method='GET',
                      Headers={['Content-Type']='application/json'}})
        if not r or r.StatusCode ~= 200 then return end
        local d = HttpService:JSONDecode(r.Body)
        if not d or not d.alerts then return end
        for _, a in ipairs(d.alerts) do
            onAlert({
                jobId    = a.jobId,
                placeId  = a.placeId,
                brainrots= a.brainrots,
                genValue = a.genValue,
            })
        end
        lastCwPoll = os.time() * 1000
    end)
end

-- WebSocket connection
local function tryWS()
    task.spawn(function()
        task.wait(3)
        local ok = pcall(function()
            if not WebSocket then error('no ws api') end
            local ws = WebSocket.connect(WS_URL)
            setDot(true)

            ws.OnMessage:Connect(function(msg)
                pcall(function()
                    local d = HttpService:JSONDecode(msg)
                    if d.type == 'alert' then
                        onAlert(d)
                    elseif d.alerts then
                        for _, a in ipairs(d.alerts) do onAlert(a) end
                    end
                end)
            end)

            ws.OnClose:Connect(function()
                setDot(false)
                task.delay(10, tryWS)
            end)
        end)
        if not ok then
            setDot(false)
            task.delay(15, tryWS)
        end
    end)
end

-- ================================================================
-- BUTTON WIRING
-- ================================================================

local function toggleWin()
    guiOpen = not guiOpen
    win.Visible = guiOpen
    toggleBtn.TextColor3       = guiOpen and C.BG     or C.ACCENT
    toggleBtn.BackgroundColor3 = guiOpen and C.ACCENT or C.BG
end

toggleBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(toggleWin)
closeBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    guiOpen=false; win.Visible=false
    toggleBtn.TextColor3=C.ACCENT; toggleBtn.BackgroundColor3=C.BG
end)
clearBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    for _, c in ipairs(scrollFrame:GetChildren()) do
        if c:IsA('Frame') then c:Destroy() end
    end
    logEntries={}; rowCount=0; rowFrames={}
    emptyLbl.Visible=true; emptyLbl.Parent=scrollFrame
    countLbl.Text='0 servers found'
end)

filterBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    filterActive = not filterActive
    filterBtn.BackgroundColor3 = filterActive and C.ACCENT    or C.ACCENT_DRK
    filterBtn.TextColor3       = filterActive and C.BG        or C.ACCENT
    refreshRows()
end)

searchInput:GetPropertyChangedSignal('Text'):Connect(function()
    searchText = searchInput.Text
    refreshRows()
end)
autoJoinBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    autoJoinEnabled = not autoJoinEnabled
    autoJoinBtn.Text             = autoJoinEnabled and 'AUTO: ON'  or 'AUTO: OFF'
    autoJoinBtn.BackgroundColor3 = autoJoinEnabled and C.ACCENT    or C.ACCENT_DRK
    autoJoinBtn.TextColor3       = autoJoinEnabled and C.BG        or C.ACCENT
end)
minInput.FocusLost:Connect(function()
    local minVal = parseMin(minInput.Text)
    currentMinValue = minVal
    for i=#logEntries,1,-1 do
        local e=logEntries[i]
        if e.genValue < minVal then
            local r=scrollFrame:FindFirstChild('R_'..e.jobId)
            if r then r:Destroy() end
            if currentJobId==e.jobId then setJoining('',false); currentJobId=nil end
            if spamActive and spamJobId==e.jobId then stopSpam(nil) end
            table.remove(logEntries,i)
        end
    end
    emptyLbl.Visible=#logEntries==0
    countLbl.Text=#logEntries..' server'..(#logEntries==1 and '' or 's')..' found'
end)

-- ================================================================
-- ANTI-AFK
-- ================================================================

task.spawn(function()
    local VirtualUser = game:GetService('VirtualUser')
    game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Idled:Connect(function()
        VirtualUser:Button2Down(Vector2.new(0,0), workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame)
        task.wait(1)
        VirtualUser:Button2Up(Vector2.new(0,0), workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame)
    end)
end)

-- ================================================================
-- CW WEBSOCKET
-- ================================================================

local function onCwAlert(a)
    if not a then return end
    onAlert({
        jobId    = a.jobId,
        placeId  = a.placeId,
        brainrots= a.brainrots,
        genValue = a.genValue,
    })
end

local tryCwWS
tryCwWS = function()
    task.spawn(function()
        task.wait(3)
        local ok = pcall(function()
            if not WebSocket then error('no ws api') end
            local ws = WebSocket.connect(CW_WS_URL)
            cwWsLive = true
            ws.OnMessage:Connect(function(msg)
                pcall(function()
                    local d = HttpService:JSONDecode(msg)
                    if d.type == 'alert' then
                        onCwAlert(d)
                    elseif d.alerts then
                        for _, a in ipairs(d.alerts) do onCwAlert(a) end
                    end
                end)
            end)
            ws.OnClose:Connect(function()
                cwWsLive = false
                task.delay(10, tryCwWS)
            end)
        end)
        if not ok then
            cwWsLive = false
            task.delay(15, tryCwWS)
        end
    end)
end

-- ================================================================
-- DEXFINDER WS FEED  (wss://dexfinderwss0-10m.up.railway.app/ws)
-- Message format: "Name | 33.0M/s | 7 | jobId-uuid"
-- ================================================================

local DEX_WS_URL = 'wss://dexfinderwss0-10m.up.railway.app/ws'
local dexWsLive  = false
local dexSeen    = {}

local DEX_WEBHOOKS = {
    LOW  = 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1490577581702123663/Hdjq49y10HrYdC5iObiTbtqQw6P8RhtbZmZ8XsDlB3OlfBykePNO3vWaZmCQfOkVnUrN',
    MID  = 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1490577711251456022/HHUvQiVqZNoM8Wq6uXd3KpoMeTiBQ2wD2Tib4jZyd9USFY2InQMJsakiYbX0d4_olmUk',
    HIGH = 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1490577915178647744/yYBixHJ6Kasl8W_ef9ePeo6oqSnMvwXMCuHozDCvurfKkCE4l7vor2Mq3sUyHu-eI3BT',
    MEGA = 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1490577773100666910/Nhm7nxE9bcy7n-_pT1nrArA7CAm_qfsSCMql0kOHWprWKzx-zZnJYy77R6XhvKnH_HXE',
    OG   = 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1490577981775679628/6Al_4vJlISDSblKsWbqA7BFOflgFWnRKQL5Fo_sN613B1iuu1YK4Hy6lbWyfLrv8LIrA',
}

local function parseDexGen(s)
    local n, suf = s:match('([%d%.]+)([MmBbTtKk]?)')
    if not n then return 0 end
    local v  = tonumber(n) or 0
    local su = (suf or ''):lower()
    if su == 'm' then v = v * 1e6
    elseif su == 'b' then v = v * 1e9
    elseif su == 't' then v = v * 1e12
    elseif su == 'k' then v = v * 1e3 end
    return v
end

local function getDexTier(gen, name)
    if isOgOrSecret(name) then
        return DEX_WEBHOOKS.OG, 0xFFD700, '⭐ OG / Secret'
    end
    if gen >= 1e9  then return DEX_WEBHOOKS.MEGA, 0x9B59B6, '🔮 1B+ Tier' end
    if gen >= 4e8  then return DEX_WEBHOOKS.HIGH, 0xE67E22, '🔥 400M–999M Tier' end
    if gen >= 1e8  then return DEX_WEBHOOKS.MID,  0x3498DB, '⚡ 100M–300M Tier' end
    return DEX_WEBHOOKS.LOW, 0x2ECC71, '✅ 10M–100M Tier'
end

local function sendDexEmbed(name, genStr, gen, players, jobId)
    if not reqFn then return end
    local url, color, tierLabel = getDexTier(gen, name)
    local safeName   = tostring(name):gsub('\\','\\\\'):gsub('"','\\"')
    local joinUrl    = 'https://www.roblox.com/games/109983668079237/game?privateServerLinkCode='..tostring(jobId)
    local ts         = os.date('!%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')

    local body = '{"embeds":[{'..
        '"title":"'..tierLabel..'",'..
        '"color":'..tostring(color)..','..
        '"fields":['..
            '{"name":"🐾  Brainrot","value":"`'..safeName..'`","inline":true},'..
            '{"name":"⚡  Gen Rate","value":"`'..tostring(genStr)..'`","inline":true},'..
            '{"name":"👥  Players","value":"`'..tostring(players)..'`","inline":true},'..
            '{"name":"🎮  Server ID","value":"```'..tostring(jobId)..'```","inline":false},'..
            '{"name":"🔗  Join","value":"[Tap to join]('..joinUrl..')","inline":false}'..
        '],'..
        '"footer":{"text":"DexFinder  •  xprofit notifier"},'..
        '"timestamp":"'..ts..'"'..
    '}]}'

    task.spawn(function()
        pcall(function()
            reqFn({ Url=url, Method='POST', Headers={['Content-Type']='application/json'}, Body=body })
        end)
    end)
end

local function onDexMessage(raw)
    -- "Gold Burrito Bandito | 33.0M/s | 7 | 596568c1-0cf8-4aec-8207-564ec0d9b60b"
    local name, genStr, players, jobId =
        raw:match('^%s*(.-)%s*|%s*([%d%.]+[MmBbTtKk]?/?[sS]?)%s*|%s*(%d+)%s*|%s*([%x%-]+)%s*$')
    if not name or not jobId or jobId == '' then return end
    if dexSeen[jobId] then return end
    dexSeen[jobId] = true
    task.delay(300, function() dexSeen[jobId] = nil end)

    local gen = parseDexGen(genStr)
    if gen < 1e7 then return end  -- ignore sub-10M servers

    local entry = { jobId=jobId, placeId=CONFIG.PLACE_ID, brainrots=name, genValue=gen }

    addRow(entry)
    sendDexEmbed(name, genStr, gen, players, jobId)
    forwardToCW(entry)
end

local function tryDexWS()
    if not WebSocket then return end
    task.spawn(function()
        local ok = pcall(function()
            local ws = WebSocket.connect(DEX_WS_URL)
            dexWsLive = true
            ws.OnMessage:Connect(function(msg)
                task.spawn(function() pcall(onDexMessage, tostring(msg)) end)
            end)
            ws.OnClose:Connect(function()
                dexWsLive = false
                task.delay(10, tryDexWS)
            end)
        end)
        if not ok then
            dexWsLive = false
            task.delay(15, tryDexWS)
        end
    end)
end

-- ================================================================
-- START
-- ================================================================

tryWS()
tryCwWS()
tryDexWS()

task.spawn(function()
    task.wait(4)
    while true do
        if not wsLive then pollOnce() end
        if not cwWsLive then pollCW() end
        task.wait(CONFIG.POLL_INTERVAL)
    end
end)

-- ================================================================
-- WEBSOCKET HOOK  (intercepts game WS pushes → feeds addRow)
-- ================================================================
-- If the game connects to any external WS (e.g. Railway endpoint),
-- we intercept incoming messages and parse them as brainrot alerts.
-- ================================================================

local WS_BLOCKED = {
    'roblox.com','roblox.auth','roblox-auth','rbxcdn.com',
    'rbxtrk.com','robloxlabs.com','roblox.net','rbxcloud.com',
    'luarmor','luraph','corescripts','luthentication',
}
local function wsUrlBlocked(url)
    local lo = url:lower()
    for _, p in ipairs(WS_BLOCKED) do
        if lo:find(p, 1, true) then return true end
    end
    return false
end

-- Try to parse a raw WS message into an addRow-compatible entry.
local function parseWsMsg(raw)
    local ok, data = pcall(function() return HttpService:JSONDecode(raw) end)
    if not ok or type(data) ~= 'table' then return nil end

    local jobId    = data.jobId    or data.job_id    or data.id       or data.serverId
    local brains   = data.brainrots or data.name     or data.pets     or data.animals or data.label
    local genVal   = tonumber(data.genValue or data.gen_value or data.value or data.genPerSecond or 0)
    local placeId  = tonumber(data.placeId  or data.place_id  or CONFIG.PLACE_ID)

    if type(jobId) ~= 'string' or jobId == '' then return nil end
    if type(brains) ~= 'string' or brains == '' then
        -- tolerate if it's a table (array of names)
        if type(brains) == 'table' then
            local parts = {}
            for _, v in ipairs(brains) do table.insert(parts, tostring(v)) end
            brains = table.concat(parts, ', ')
        else
            return nil
        end
    end

    return {
        jobId    = jobId,
        placeId  = placeId or CONFIG.PLACE_ID,
        brainrots= brains,
        genValue = genVal,
    }
end

if WebSocket then
    local _origConnect = WebSocket.connect
    WebSocket.connect = function(url, ...)
        local ws = _origConnect(url, ...)
        if ws and not wsUrlBlocked(url) then
            pcall(function()
                ws.OnMessage:Connect(function(msg)
                    task.spawn(function()
                        local entry = parseWsMsg(tostring(msg))
                        if entry then
                            addRow(entry)
                        end
                    end)
                end)
            end)
        end
        return ws
    end
end

-- ================================================================
-- HEAD TAG  (only visible between players running this script)
-- ================================================================
-- How it works:
--   1. Every 30 s POST username + jobId to /api/xp-presence (TTL 90 s).
--   2. Every 6 s GET the list of users in this server from the backend.
--   3. For each returned username (excluding ourselves), find the Player
--      and attach a LOCAL BillboardGui inside our own PlayerGui — never
--      replicated, completely invisible to anyone not running the script.
-- ================================================================

local XP_BASE      = "https://c7b7e3b9-1c9c-4e84-8462-3264380bea88-00-2obj4bq0m7blq-lad4kvuf.spock.replit.dev"
local XP_KEY       = "0162ec8065638f841764703541363d228caa86e7"
local XP_URL       = XP_BASE .. "/api/xp-presence"
local MY_JOB       = tostring(game.JobId)
local MY_NAME      = LocalPlayer.Name
local TAG_HOLDER   = "XprofitTagHolder"

local tagHolder = PlayerGui:FindFirstChild(TAG_HOLDER)
if tagHolder then tagHolder:Destroy() end
tagHolder = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
tagHolder.Name = TAG_HOLDER
tagHolder.ResetOnSpawn = false
tagHolder.Parent = PlayerGui

local activeTags = {}  -- [username] = BillboardGui

local function makeTag(player)
    if activeTags[player.Name] then return end
    local char = player.Character
    if not char then return end
    local head = char:FindFirstChild("Head")
    if not head then return end

    local bb = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
    bb.Size = UDim2.new(0, 420, 0, 44)
    bb.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 4.4, 0)
    bb.AlwaysOnTop = false
    bb.LightInfluence = 0
    bb.Adornee = head
    bb.Parent = tagHolder
    activeTags[player.Name] = bb

    local bg = Instance.new("Frame", bb)
    bg.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
    bg.BorderSizePixel = 0
    bg.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(8, 8, 8)
    Instance.new("UICorner", bg).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 7)
    local stroke = Instance.new("UIStroke", bg)
    stroke.Thickness = 1.8
    stroke.Color = Color3.fromRGB(100, 100, 100)
    stroke.Transparency = 0.1

    local lbl = Instance.new("TextLabel", bg)
    lbl.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
    lbl.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    lbl.Text = "XProfit Joiner USER -  DONT GRIEF!!"
    lbl.TextSize = 22
    lbl.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBlack
    lbl.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(230, 230, 230)
    lbl.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.6
    lbl.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)

    local capName = player.Name
    task.spawn(function()
        while bb.Parent and head.Parent and activeTags[capName] == bb do
            task.wait(1)
        end
        if bb.Parent then bb:Destroy() end
    end)

    player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
        if activeTags[capName] == bb then
            bb:Destroy(); activeTags[capName] = nil
        end
        task.wait(1)
        local p = Players:FindFirstChild(capName)
        if p then makeTag(p) end
    end)
end

local function removeTag(username)
    if activeTags[username] then
        activeTags[username]:Destroy()
        activeTags[username] = nil
    end
end

Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(p) removeTag(p.Name) end)

local xpReq = reqFn or (syn and syn.request) or request or http_request or httprequest

task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        pcall(function()
            if not xpReq then return end
            xpReq({
                Url     = XP_URL,
                Method  = "POST",
                Headers = {["Content-Type"] = "application/json"},
                Body    = HttpService:JSONEncode({ username = MY_NAME, jobId = MY_JOB, key = XP_KEY }),
            })
        end)
        task.wait(30)
    end
end)

task.spawn(function()
    task.wait(2)
    while true do
        local ok, result = pcall(function()
            if not xpReq then return end
            local r = xpReq({
                Url    = XP_URL .. "?jobId=" .. MY_JOB .. "&key=" .. XP_KEY,
                Method = "GET",
            })
            if r and (r.StatusCode == 200 or r.Success) then
                return HttpService:JSONDecode(r.Body)
            end
        end)
        if ok and result and result.users then
            local seen = {}
            for _, uname in ipairs(result.users) do
                if uname ~= MY_NAME then
                    seen[uname] = true
                    local p = Players:FindFirstChild(uname)
                    if p and not activeTags[uname] then makeTag(p) end
                end
            end
            for uname in pairs(activeTags) do
                if not seen[uname] then removeTag(uname) end
            end
        end
        task.wait(6)
    end
end)
